description: IdealSpot is a location intelligence and geodata analytics product for commercial real-estate and site-selection use cases. Its public materials describe demographic, geometry, and traffic data services, but the documented API endpoint is hosted on idealgeo.com rather than idealspot.com.
summary: idealspot.com itself exposes no confirmed developer surface on its own domain; the only developer docs found describe a REST Geodata API hosted on idealgeo.com and authenticated via a RapidAPI-issued key.
